title: Response to the report on the terrorism acts in 2023
body: "This is the government’s response to The Terrorism Acts in 2023, a report by Jonathan Hall KC, the Independent Reviewer of Terrorism Legislation (IRTL).  The Independent Reviewer is responsible for monitoring the operation of UK counter-terrorism legislation to assess its fairness, effectiveness, and proportionality.  The government response addresses the following topics that were covered in the report:   UK threat picture impact of Hamas attacks in October 2023 humanitarian aid and security balance statistics and transparency schedule 7 port examination issues terrorist-connected offenders TPIMs and legal aid updates on previous recommendations  "
